description: Physics puzzle — place gravity attractors to guide particle streams through obstacles to target zones
prompt: Build a physics puzzle game with HTML5 canvas. Particles stream from a source point. Player clicks to place gravity well attractors that pull particles using inverse-square gravity. Guide particles through obstacles to a green target zone. 5 levels of increasing complexity with walls and moving obstacles. Particles leave colorful trails. Limited wells per level. Score by collecting particles in target. Dark space theme with purple-to-cyan particle gradient.
